tokenNotFound: Token "{tokenName}" not found in {prefix} tokens. Available tokens: {available}
variantNotFound: Variant "{variantName}" not found for token "{tokenName}" in {prefix} tokens. Available variants: {available}
modeNotFound: Mode "{mode}" not found for token "{tokenName}.{variantName}". This token has no "{mode}" override defined.
darkTokenGroupNotFound: Build error: Dark mode defines "{tokenName}" but it doesn't exist in default tokens. Available token groups: {available}
darkTokenVariantNotFound: Build error: Dark mode defines "{tokenName}.{variantName}" but it doesn't exist in default tokens. Available variants for {tokenName}: {available}
